# skill_evolve module constants
ACTIVE_PITFALL_CAP = 10
ANTI_PATTERN_REJECTION_COUNT = 2
BAND_AID_THRESHOLD = 10
CANDIDATE_PROMOTION_COUNT = 2
ERROR_FREQUENCY_THRESHOLD = 3
GRADUATED_TTL_DAYS = 30
GRADUATION_THRESHOLDS = [(1, 3), (2, 5), (3, 10)]
HIGH_CONFIDENCE = 0.85
HIGH_SUITABILITY_THRESHOLD = 12
HOT_TIER_MAX_ITEMS = 5
HOT_TOKEN_BUDGET = 500
INTEGRATION_JACCARD_THRESHOLD = 0.3
MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE = 0.6
MEDIUM_SUITABILITY_THRESHOLD = 8
PITFALL_MAX_LINES = 100
RATIONALIZATION_MIN_CORRECTIONS = 3
RATIONALIZATION_OUTCOME_WINDOW_DAYS = 30
RATIONALIZATION_SKIP_KEYWORDS = ['skip', 'スキップ', '省略', 'bypass', 'later', '後で', '不要', 'unnecessary', 'without', 'なし', 'いらない', '面倒', 'time', '時間がない', '急ぎ']
ROOT_CAUSE_JACCARD_THRESHOLD = 0.5
STALE_ESCALATION_MONTHS = 3
STALE_KNOWLEDGE_MONTHS = 6
SUCCESS_PATTERN_LIMIT = 2
TELEMETRY_LOOKBACK_DAYS = 30
VERIFICATION_SKILL_KEYWORDS = ['verify', 'validate', 'check', 'lint', 'test', 'qa', 'audit', 'assert', 'inspect', 'scan']
WARM_TOKEN_BUDGET = 1000

# skill_evolve public function / class signatures
apply_evolve_proposal(proposal: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]
assess_single_skill(skill_name: str, skill_dir: pathlib.Path, *, project: str | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any]
classify_suitability(total_score: int) -> str
compute_llm_scores(skill_name: str, skill_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Dict[str, Any]
compute_telemetry_scores(skill_name: str, *, project: str | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any]
detect_anti_patterns(scores: Dict[str, int], skill_dir: pathlib.Path) -> List[Dict[str, str]]
evolve_skill_proposal(skill_name: str, skill_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Dict[str, Any]
is_self_evolved_skill(skill_dir: pathlib.Path) -> bool
is_verification_skill(skill_name: str, skill_dir: pathlib.Path) -> bool
skill_evolve_assessment(project_dir: pathlib.Path | None = None, *, project: str | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]

# skill_evolve private helpers expected by tests / mock.patch
_file_hash: present
_load_cache: present
_save_cache: present
_score_execution_frequency: present
_score_failure_diversity: present
_score_output_evaluability: present
_count_external_keywords: present
_score_external_dependency: present
_score_judgment_complexity_llm: present
_customize_template: present
_find_project_dir: present
_plugin_root: present
CACHE_FILE: present
DATA_DIR: present
